ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host domain of the cookie */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider of the tracking cookie (e.g., LinkedIn, Google) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tracking cookie */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration period of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "opt_out" TEXT /* Opt-out link or method for the cookie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was last updated */,
  "cookie_type" TEXT /* Type of the cookie (e.g., session, persistent) */,
  "cookie_category" TEXT /* Category of the cookie (e.g., marketing, analytics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider (e.g., LinkedIn, Google) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the cookie */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., consented, revoked) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used for the interaction (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_logs_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report contents */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opt_out_preferences" (
  "opt_out_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opt-out entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user opting out */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which the user opted out */,
  "opt_out_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user opted out (true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opt-out preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opt-out preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opt_out_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opt_out_preferences_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opt_out_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being tracked */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the cookie was used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was last used */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of sessions using the cookie in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., marketing, analytics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_providers" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the cookie and provider (e.g., owned, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id", "provider_id")
)
